heading: Rules and regulations
label: 777i Rules and regulations
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to make rules and regulations for carrying out the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of functions to Secretary of Commerce from Secretary of the Interior by Reorg. Plan No. 4 of 1970, eff. , 35 F.R. 15627, , see note set out under .Oct. 3, 197084 Stat. 2090section 777 of this title
